hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: The virtual DOM is a lightweight JavaScript copy of the real DOM. React updates the virtual DOM first, then applies only the differences to the real DOM as an optimization.
correctAnswer_he: virtual DOM הוא עותק JavaScript קל של ה-DOM האמיתי. React מעדכן קודם את ה-virtual DOM, ואז מחיל רק את ההבדלים על ה-DOM האמיתי כאופטימיזציה.

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: JSX is a syntax extension to JavaScript that allows HTML-like markup inside JS code.
correctAnswer_he: JSX הוא הרחבת תחביר ל-JavaScript שמאפשרת markup דמוי HTML בתוך קוד JS.

question_he: אתגר: תאר את מחזור החיים של React Component
hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: In hooks: mount/update via useEffect, cleanup via the function returned from useEffect. In class components: componentDidMount, componentDidUpdate, and componentWillUnmount.
correctAnswer_he: ב-hooks: mount/update דרך useEffect, cleanup דרך הפונקציה שמוחזרת מ-useEffect. ב-class components: componentDidMount, componentDidUpdate ו-componentWillUnmount.

question_en: Challenge: When would you use refs?
hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: Use refs to store values that do not affect rendering, such as DOM nodes, timeout IDs, or other imperative handles.
correctAnswer_he: משתמשים ב-refs לשמירת ערכים שלא משפיעים על rendering, כמו DOM nodes, timeout IDs או handles אימפרטיביים אחרים.

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: Context passes data through the component tree without manually passing props at every level, useful for theme, locale, or authenticated user.
correctAnswer_he: Context מעביר נתונים דרך עץ הקומפוננטות בלי להעביר props ידנית בכל רמה, שימושי ל-theme, locale או משתמש מאומת.

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: memo skips re-rendering a component when its props are unchanged.
correctAnswer_he: memo מדלג על re-render של קומפוננטה כשה-props שלה לא השתנו.

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: useMemo caches the result of a calculation between re-renders until dependencies change.
correctAnswer_he: useMemo שומר ב-cache את תוצאת חישוב בין re-renders עד שה-dependencies משתנים.
code_snippet: const visibleTodos = useMemo(() => filterTodos(todos, tab), [todos, tab])

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: useCallback caches a function definition between re-renders until dependencies change.
correctAnswer_he: useCallback שומר ב-cache הגדרת פונקציה בין re-renders עד שה-dependencies משתנים.

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: PropTypes and defaultProps let you validate and default props passed from a parent component.
correctAnswer_he: PropTypes ו-defaultProps מאפשרים לאמת ולהגדיר ברירות מחדל ל-props שמועברים מקומפוננטת הורה.

question_en: Challenge: when should you code a custom-hook?
hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: Custom hooks extract reusable stateful logic at the component layer, such as online status or data fetching patterns.
correctAnswer_he: custom hooks מחלצים לוגיקה stateful לשימוש חוזר בשכבת הקומפוננטות, כמו סטטוס online או דפוסי data fetching.

question_en: Challenge: List down the components of Redux
hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: Redux is composed of Actions, Reducers, Store, and View.
correctAnswer_he: Redux מורכב מ-Actions, Reducers, Store ו-View.

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: A higher-order component is a function that takes a component and returns a new enhanced component, such as withRouter or connect.
correctAnswer_he: higher-order component היא פונקציה שמקבלת קומפוננטה ומחזירה קומפוננטה משופרת חדשה, כמו withRouter או connect.

hint_en: Focus on the key concepts from the official answer.
correctAnswer_en: An accordion group tracks the active item index and passes isActive and onToggle to each AccordionItem, often using React.Children.map and cloneElement.
correctAnswer_he: קבוצת accordion עוקבת אחר אינדקס הפריט הפעיל ומעבירה isActive ו-onToggle לכל AccordionItem, לעיתים עם React.Children.map ו-cloneElement.
